reasoning_chain_text: 1. For Chicago departments, compute total overtime costs in 2018, 2019, 2020, and 2021, then keep the department with the highest average overtime across those years.
2. Determine the first head of that department.
3. For that person, identify the cities where they previously served as police chief, then keep the city where they also founded a criminal justice program at a local university.
4. Determine the county containing that city and report the county name.
original_final_question: Identify the first head of Chicago's department with the highest average overtime between 2018 and 2021. In the city where that person previously served as police chief and founded a criminal justice program at a local university, what county is the city located in? Only report the county name in the format of `X County`. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
original_reasoning_chain: Aggregation: Average overtime 2018-2021 -> POLICE: $145,766,071.37, FIRE: $82,974,361.14, WATER MGMT: $28,414,645.19
Result: POLICE department has highest average overtime -> Chicago Police Department
Node 5: First civilian superintendent of CPD -> O. W. Wilson (served 1960-1967)
Node 6 (Wikipedia O._W._Wilson): Cities where Wilson was police chief -> {Fullerton, Wichita}
Node 7 (Wikipedia Wichita_Police_Department): City where Wilson started CJ program at university -> Wichita (at WSU in 1937)
Filter: City where Wilson was BOTH police chief AND started CJ program -> {Wichita}
Node 8: County containing Wichita -> Sedgwick County, Kansas
